title: Jet Elytra
description: Replaces the player model with jets when flying, Looks cool for drain pvp, and even just normal survival.
body:
**JetEly**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow) [![Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/Source-181717?logo=github&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/cutebow/Jet-Elytra)
--- Required: - [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - [Mod Menu ](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) New! - jet boost flames (afterburner) use the keybind to open it Replaces when you fly with elytra, or other players with a model of a aircraft of your choice comes with pre-added models, tutorial on how to add you're own in my discord **Fully client side works on servers** - The bombing also works on servers if you have /summon perms If you would like to help support the development of this mod - https://ko-fi.com/cutebow --- **Help** - How do I change my jet/model? Just go to settings in the elytra tab delete the mcjet text inside the search bar then it will suggest all the models you have click on one or scroll through them to select it then click save and it should be there! optional to hide the player model so it looks fully like you're the model. also works with other players and has a randomize model option for other players - when its off they just have the same as yours. I recommend using the freelook mod Also supports shader glow with textures that match the obj file name but with _e.png at the end - it has to be .png includes tnt minecart replacement and then a bombing feature that includes a keybind you can hold it down customize the bombing speed and cool down basiclly what it does is summon a tnt minecart and since theres models for the tnt minecart it looks like actual bombs `/gamerule sendCommandFeedback false` to disable the summon msgs in chat theres more models that gallery doesn't show, and you can get them from my discord ![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/syVizvzu/images/5b1761a680d1bba5744e08295853d81cac6e9125.png) [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
